title: Partner With Us
intro: DESCF is open to collaboration with funders and institutions interested in conservation, research, climate adaptation, and sustainable enterprise in Bangladesh.
body:
## Why DESCF

DESCF brings together a field-based conservation profile, a specialised focus on herpetofauna, experience in public awareness, and a clear programme direction for the next phase of work.

## Areas of Partnership

- Conservation grants for herpetofauna conservation, awareness, and coexistence-related work
- Research grants for monitoring, pilot preparation, amphibian bioacoustics, and field documentation
- Climate adaptation grants for climate-responsive conservation and biodiversity-related resilience planning
- Sustainable enterprise grants for early-stage work related to conservation-linked green enterprise
- Programme design support for seminars, learning materials, concept notes, and technical review

## Support Relevant to the Next Phase

DESCF welcomes support for pilot development, monitoring tools, training, field testing, applied research, and structured programme development.

## Institutional Collaboration

DESCF is open to collaboration with universities, research groups, conservation organisations, and professional networks interested in field-based learning, public engagement, and emerging programme development in Bangladesh.

## Relevant Partners

This page is intended for conservation funders, research institutions, climate adaptation programmes, educational organisations, and collaborators whose interests align with DESCF’s present and planned programme scope.
